---
title: "context.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\context.py"
loc: 49
complexity: 6
logic_score: 6.13
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 6.30
overall_score: 4.31
---

## Intent
The `context.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SovereignContext, __init__, _load_feedback_context, teardown. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignContext, __init__, _load_feedback_context, teardown. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [gc](file://gc)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core](file://src.core)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.tools.compile_session_traces](file://src.tools.compile_session_traces)

### Exports
- `SovereignContext`
- `__init__`
- `_load_feedback_context`
- `teardown`
